overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player exploring a medieval campsite at night. The player holds a wooden staff and walks through a torch-lit encampment with tents, wagons, and campfires, eventually encountering a horse and a torch-bearing villager.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path along stone wall leading to camp entrance

events.description: path opens into a torch-lit medieval campsite with wooden carts and campfires

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow dirt path beside a stone wall, holding a wooden staff with bloodied hands

entered.detail: rough stone wall running along the right side of the narrow path
green leafy bushes and grass lining the left side of the path
narrow dirt trail with patches of grass leading into the camp
wooden wagon with large wheels parked near the camp entrance
flickering fire providing warm orange light in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall and vegetation, holding a wooden staff. As the path opens around 10 seconds, a medieval campsite comes into view with wooden carts and a campfire illuminating the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open camp area with supply storage and cooking areas

events.description: a white horse appears standing near tents in the camp, then moves away

agents.ego_description: moving through the camp interior, passing wooden carts and supply crates while surveying the area

notable_agents.action: white horse standing still near tents, then walking away into the darkness

entered.detail: wooden tripod structure with a pot hanging over a fire
simple wooden bench near the supply area
large boulders marking a path boundary
canvas tent visible in the background among the trees

segments.scene_description: The player explores the open camp area, passing cooking tripods and wooden benches. At 25 seconds, a white horse becomes visible near the tents before moving away. The stone wall and dense vegetation from the entry path are left behind as the player moves deeper into the encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tent area with canvas shelters and supply storage

agents.ego_description: navigating between canvas tents and supply piles, moving deeper into the encampment

entered.detail: large tent with red and white striped canvas canopy
lit lantern on a wooden post illuminating the tent entrance
stacked wooden crates and barrels near the tents

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a denser section of the camp featuring red and white striped canvas tents illuminated by lanterns. Supply crates and wooden benches line the path as the player leaves the open cooking area behind and navigates under the canvas canopies.

events.description: encountering a villager holding a torch near a covered wagon

agents.ego_description: approaching a torch-bearing villager near a covered wagon, staff raised slightly

notable_agents.action: villager in green tunic holding a burning torch, standing near a covered wagon

entered.detail: large wooden wagon with canvas cover and wooden wheels
lantern hanging from a rope line between tents

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the camp perimeter where a large covered wagon stands on the left. At 55 seconds, a villager holding a torch comes into view near the wagon. The player continues forward, closing the distance to the NPC as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded dirt path into the heart of a bustling, torch-lit medieval encampment. It begins by moving along a narrow trail bordered by a stone wall and dense vegetation, holding a wooden staff until the path opens to reveal a campsite illuminated by a central campfire and wooden carts. As the camera leaves the restrictive walls behind to explore the open camp, it passes cooking tripods and wooden benches before a white horse emerges and retreats near the tents. The scene then shifts into a denser section of the camp, navigating under the canvas canopies of red and white striped tents lined with supply crates and lanterns. Finally, the movement leads toward the camp perimeter where a large covered wagon stands, closing the distance to a torch-bearing villager.
